Focus / Description: Founded by Markus Zejermann. Deal-by-deal model. Team from German-speaking region / UK / Spain. Matches each opportunity with right investors from network. Flexibility and alignment focus.

Name: Eureka! Venture SGR (ETA Fund)
Check Size / AUM: ETA Fund I - first Italian institutional SF fund
Focus / Description: Launched May 2025 by Paolo Guida (key-man). Partnership with POLIMI Graduate School of Management. Anchor investor: Fondazione CR di Lucca. 49% institutional LPs / 18% family offices / 33% individuals.

Name: Iberia NCA NF I
Focus / Description: Founded by Fidel Garcia-Guzman (CEO Guzman Global) and Pablo Penichet (BBooster). Co-invests with Novastone Capital Advisors (NCA). Portfolio: Mecavit (Italy) / Extended Power (USA) / Garner Osborne Circuits (UK). Royo family as LP.

Name: Cassius Search
Focus / Description: Founded by Stanislas Simon-Beaulieu (also partner at Cameleon Invest). French entrepreneurial investment platform. Launches 2 search funds/year. Pools search tools and intermediated deal flow. Co-founded Joto Transmission SF.

Name: Promax Capital Investments
Focus / Description: Backs ETA entrepreneurs. Search fund financing / business acquisition support / CEO mentorship for growth. Active in European and global search fund ecosystem.

Name: Orangeland Capital
Focus / Description: Founded 2024 by former PE investor and investment banker. Targets SMEs with recurring revenue in Netherlands or Belgium. Low cyclicality / attractive macro trends / fragmented industries.

Name: IronBridge Partners
Focus / Description: Founded by Gaspar d'Orey. Independent search fund in Iberia (Portugal and Spain). Acquires and operates a single exceptional private company. Bridges legacy and growth in founder-led businesses. Digital transformation and sustainable expansion focus.

Name: Wallonie Entreprendre
Focus / Description: Walloon public economic tool. Supports search fund initiatives in Belgium. Equity / loans / guarantees. Co-invested EUR 25M in scale-up anchoring fund. Hosts EuroQuity platform.

Name: Sowaccess / Laurent Wenric
Focus / Description: Active supporter of search fund model in Belgium. Participated in panels challenging SF model. Investor providing local institutional support for Belgian search fund ecosystem.

Name: Simon Webster
Focus / Description: Raised first search fund outside USA (1993). Acquired RSL in 1995 (grew 10x to GBP 30M). Teaches at LBS and Cambridge Judge. Advisory Board member at Vonzeo Capital. Investor and educator focused on ETA.

Name: Gernot Eisinger
Focus / Description: See Geharon entry. Pioneer of European SF investing. Co-Founder Afinum and Rigeto. INSEAD EIR. Founding donor of INSEAD ETA & Search Funds Hub. PhD + MBA INSEAD.

Name: Dr. Thomas Buehler / Valmaris
Focus / Description: 35+ years / 300+ transactions in succession PE. Founded Agirax family office. Transitioned to serial SF investor in 2013. Geographical preference for Southern Europe and DACH.

Name: Paolo Guida
Check Size / AUM: Pioneer of serial SF investing in Italy since 2017
Focus / Description: Seasoned M&A and PE professional. Key-man of Eureka! Venture ETA Fund. Launched first Italian institutional fund focused on search funds.

Name: Enrico Arietti
Focus / Description: Founder of Search Fund Club (SFClub). Partner at Oaklins Italy. Promoter of Industrial Stars of Italy. Co-leads SFClub with Riccardo Triolo.

Name: Riccardo Triolo
Focus / Description: Co-founder of Search Fund Club (SFClub) with Enrico Arietti. Active in European search fund investing.

Name: Loris Lanzellotti
Focus / Description: Specialized search fund investor in Italy. Invests alongside Paolo Guida and other Italian SF investors. Participated in Evoluzione Vulturnus investor group.

Name: Paolo Zappa
Focus / Description: Italian entrepreneur and search fund investor. Part of investor group in Evoluzione Vulturnus and other Italian search funds.

Name: Fabio Costa
Focus / Description: Italian search fund investor. Participated in Evoluzione Vulturnus. Active in Italian SF ecosystem.

Name: Fernando Estrada
Focus / Description: International search fund investor. Participated in Evoluzione Vulturnus alongside Italian and international investors.

Name: Jose Martin Cabiedes
Focus / Description: See Inversiones Cabiedes entry. Seasoned VC (BlaBlaCar / Privalia / Trovit / Tiendeo / Indexa Capital). Pivoted to search funds in 2016. Prefers blue-collar profiles with operational experience.

Name: Stanislas Simon-Beaulieu
Focus / Description: Partner at Cameleon Invest. Founder of Cassius Search. Pioneer of structured search fund platform model in France. Co-founded Joto Transmission with Pierre-Philippe de Bouville.

Name: Karaiba
Check Size / AUM: Family office / PE / real estate / search funds
Focus / Description: Brazilian family office active in search fund investing. Investor in MK Solutions (SaaS). One of the active SF investors in Latin American market.

Name: Continuum Legacy Partners
Focus / Description: Search fund providing continuity plan for business owners. Diverse network of investors and advisors. Completed acquisition July 2024.

Name: SFUMATO Equity Holdings
Focus / Description: Partners with Lancaster Group and high-net-worth individuals in search fund efforts.

Name: Lancaster Group
Focus / Description: Private equity firm targeting lower middle market ($2-30M revenue). Partners with SFUMATO Equity Holdings and HNW individuals.

Name: Juxon Capital Partners
Focus / Description: Founded 2022. Traditional search fund in the UK. Backed by exceptional entrepreneurs / CEOs / investors. One team member investing in search funds since 1987. Sustainable long-term growth focus.

Name: Muri Capital
Focus / Description: Traditional search fund aiming to acquire in Spain. Multi-sector search across Iberian Peninsula. Backed by Arada Capital Partners. Long-term SME growth focus.

Name: Ayete Partners
Focus / Description: Founded by Alvaro Benito Sanz and Jaime Villanueva Campos. Investors include Aurica Capital / JB46 / Istria Capital and 14 others globally. Differentiated product/service companies.

Name: Lauria Partners
Focus / Description: Founded by Miguel Camino and Alvaro Horstmann (IESE MBA). Spain's first search fund for Aerospace and Defense sector.

Name: Audaz Capital
Focus / Description: Founded by Filipe Bergana. PE firm specializing in search fund investments at global scale. Acquires and operates private companies in Iberian Peninsula.

Name: Maruna Capital
Focus / Description: Founded by Javier Marroquin Ruiz-Navarro. Key investors: Cabiedes & Partners / Kinderhook Partners / Novadvice / Novidam / SFClub. Acquired Escuela Europea de Coaching.

Name: Preludio Partners
Focus / Description: Founded by Andres Garrido and Curro Fita. Backed by Forti Search Fund Partners and other top investors. Companies with EBITDA above EUR 2M. Robust cash flows and sustainable growth potential.

Name: Patria Private Capital
Focus / Description: Founded by Guido Fileppo. Italy's first search fund acquisition (Farmoderm pharmaceutical laboratories in October 2019). Investors include Paolo Braghieri and Reed Seed investors.

Name: LDue Capital
Focus / Description: Founded 2024. Acquires and manages a single high-potential Italian SME. Long-term value creation focus.

Name: Search Fund Italia
Focus / Description: Italian search fund ecosystem platform. Tracks development of search funds in Italy. Documents market data (29 search funds surveyed 2016-2024).

Name: Evoluzione Vulturnus
Focus / Description: Founded by Andrea Biancardi and Alessio Maria Matteocci. EUR 650K initial capital. Italian SMEs in B2B food & beverage and business services. ~20 investors including Paolo Guida / Zappa / Lanzellotti / Fabio Costa / Fernando Estrada / Forti / Cerralvo / Vonzeo.

Name: Yellowhammer Strategic Partners
Focus / Description: Founded 2021. East Coast search fund. <$3M EBITDA. Light manufacturing / value-added distribution / B2B services.

Name: Growth Partners Capital
Focus / Description: Active in Iberian search fund ecosystem. Growth capital for SMEs.

Name: OwnerBridge
Focus / Description: Educational platform comparing search funds vs private equity for European SME owners. Market intelligence resource.

Name: Transmitium
Focus / Description: Search fund focused on acquiring and operating businesses in France. Comprehensive FAQ and jargon translator for search fund ecosystem.

Name: Auptimate
Focus / Description: Expert fund administration services. Helps search funds streamline operations / compliance / reporting. Resources on search fund momentum in Europe.

Name: Sigubald / ProxDeal
Focus / Description: Tech-driven M&A advisory firm founded by Simon Seibold. ProxDeal software tool for searchers and investors. Tracks search funds in Germany.

Name: Arts et Metiers Business Angels
Focus / Description: Association of alumni engineers from Arts et Metiers ParisTech. Invests in innovative companies and supports project leaders. Potential search fund angel investors.

Name: Paris Business Angels
Check Size / AUM: 200 funded companies. EUR 30M+ invested over 20 years
Focus / Description: One of France's leading business angel networks. Potential co-investors in French search fund acquisitions.

Name: Fabrice Grinda / FJ Labs
Focus / Description: French entrepreneur and super angel. Co-founded Aucland. Investments include Alibaba / Airbnb / Palantir. Potential search fund LP given French roots and alternative investment appetite.

Name: Paolo Braghieri
Focus / Description: Former CEO of GE Capital Interbanca. Investor in Patria Private Capital (Italy's first search fund acquisition). Active in Italian financial sector.

Name: Till Bossert
Focus / Description: Acquired Herchenbach via Kronos Kapital with Tobias Raeber (2015). Senior Adviser at Vonzeo Capital. Active search fund investor. Co-manages Search Fund Pioneers GmbH with Alexander Kirn.

Name: Fidel Garcia-Guzman
Check Size / AUM: CEO Guzman Global. Co-founder Iberia NCA NF I
Focus / Description: Co-founded Iberia NCA NF I (EUR 25M). Strategic alliance with Novastone Capital Advisors. Active in Valencia search fund and succession ecosystem.

Name: Pablo Penichet
Check Size / AUM: Founding partner BBooster. Co-founder Iberia NCA NF I
Focus / Description: Co-founded Iberia NCA NF I with Fidel Garcia-Guzman. Venture capital background. Focused on SME succession through search fund model.

Name: Gaspar d'Orey
Focus / Description: Managing Partner of IronBridge Partners. Iberian search fund specialist. Track record in M&A / tech / marketplaces / climate businesses.

Name: Christopher von Wedemeyer
Focus / Description: Scaled DrSmile to EUR 200M revenue / 600 employees / 10 countries before sale to Straumann Group. Founded Legacy Search Partners. Family capital approach.

Name: Alexander Schuil
Focus / Description: Founded Novidam in 2014. One of the most prolific global search fund investors. Tech-enabled services focus.

Name: Lukas Krauss
Focus / Description: Ex-Paragon Partners (5 years) and BCG. Founded INSETA Partners (EUR 60M). Closed largest ETA fund in Europe.

Name: Kieron Chalder
Focus / Description: Acquired CarPro/Jimpisoft through traditional search fund (Iberica Partners). Backed by Gernot Eisinger / Relay / Istria / Atiud / Edge Partners / AIJ. 7-8x exit to PSG Equity.

Name: Gonzalo Carmona
Focus / Description: Co-led acquisition of CarPro/Jimpisoft. One of most successful European search fund exits (to PSG Equity in 2025).

Name: Vitten Varma
Focus / Description: Part of Forti Search Fund Partners team. Active in European search fund investing.

Name: Viren Lala
Check Size / AUM: Sentinel family office. Serial SF investor
Focus / Description: Part of Forti Search Fund Partners team. Connected to Sentinel Capital family office. Active in European search fund ecosystem.

Name: Ivana Naumovska
Check Size / AUM: Teaches ETA to 400+ MBA students/year at INSEAD
Focus / Description: Supported 100+ search funds. Helped place 150+ MBAs in SF roles. Identifies / mentors / connects talent with capital. Key connector in European SF ecosystem.

Name: Jan Simon
Check Size / AUM: Managing Partner Vonzeo Capital. Academic Director IESE SF Center
Focus / Description: Global expert in search funds. 20+ years in investment industry. Ex-Salomon Brothers / Goldman Sachs / Merrill Lynch. Author of 'Search Funds & Entrepreneurial Acquisitions'.

Name: Rob Johnson
Check Size / AUM: Professor at IESE. Search fund investor
Focus / Description: Investor in search funds including Milestone Capital (Russia). Academic contributor to IESE International Search Fund Center.

Name: Fondazione CR di Lucca
Check Size / AUM: Anchor investor in Eureka! Venture ETA Fund
Focus / Description: Italian banking foundation. Anchor investor for first Italian institutional search fund vehicle (ETA Fund by Eureka! Venture SGR).

Name: Erik de Stefanis / Interlace Ventures
Focus / Description: Swedish-American investor at Interlace Ventures. Writes on Nordic search fund opportunities. Identifies fund-of-funds opportunity for Nordic searchers. North America and Nordics focus.
